backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (UserProfile, ProductDetail, Order, etc.) and public API endpoints for user profiles, contact form submissions, product catalog, and order management, with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that seeds the productDetails map with hardcoded product data for six categories (Rice, Wheat, Pulses, Spices, Processed Food, Makhana) including specifications, nutrition data, and variants on canister upgrade.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs to their affected files, component dependencies, and test IDs for the Products page variant display fix, ProductDetail page fix, and static image generation tasks.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase structure and each file's purpose.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the FarmSiddhi React SPA, mounting the app at the #root div and loading the Vite entry point src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with 11 routes, wraps the app in QueryClientProvider and CartProvider, and renders lazy-loaded page components within a shared Navigation/Footer layout.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with the FarmSiddhi logo, contact info, social media links (LinkedIn, X, Facebook), and a copyright bar with a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop and mobile nav links, and a cart icon that displays the current item count from CartContext.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: React context providing cart state management with add, remove, update quantity, and clear operations, plus derived cartTotal and itemCount values.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication via an AuthClient-backed React context, exposing login/clear functions, identity state, and login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks wrapping backend actor calls for user profiles, contact forms, product details, orders, and related mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining light/dark CSS custom properties for the design system, base body styles, and utility component classes like section-container and watermark-container.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider contexts.
frontend/src/pages/AboutUs.tsx: Static About Us page displaying FarmSiddhi's vision, mission, and business model in a card-based layout.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabs for managing orders (status updates) and contact form submissions, plus a product catalog seeding tool.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items with quantity controls, line totals, and a checkout navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Checkout page with a buyer details and shipping address form that submits an order via the usePlaceOrder hook and redirects to order confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/ContactUs.tsx: Contact Us page with a form (name, email, phone, message, user type) that submits to the backend via useSubmitContactForm and shows toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/Exports.tsx: Displays the Export Services page with a grid of service cards (quality assurance, packaging, logistics, global trade, compliance) and an international certifications section.
frontend/src/pages/FarmerNetwork.tsx: Renders the Farmer Network page showcasing services like direct procurement, fair pricing, and supply chain digitization, along with a benefits section for farmers.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Implements the homepage with a hero section, platform introduction, services overview, and a product grid linking to individual product category pages.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Shows an order confirmation page by reading order data from sessionStorage, displaying order ID, status, items, and customer details after a successful purchase.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Renders a product detail page for a given category, fetching product variants from the backend and allowing users to select variants, adjust quantity, and add items to the cart.
frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx: React page component that displays all product categories (Rice, Wheat, Pulses, Spices, Makhana, Processed Foods) with subcategories, images, badges, and links to detail pages. Includes fallback image mappings for subcategory items lacking dedicated images.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to extract URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL bar without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, font families (Inter), and accordion keyframe animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file (version 65) describing FarmSiddhi's B2B agricultural export website architecture, known issues (broken e-commerce cart, admin page, product detail pages), and required image assets for product subcategories.
